 {"id":"bd-2ixu","title":"Final verification: full build, tests, and integration check","description":"## Scope

Final verification that the Widget API migration is complete and correct.

## Verification Steps

### 1. Full Workspace Build

```bash
cargo check --workspace
cargo build --workspace
```

All crates must compile without errors.

### 2. Test Suite

```bash
cargo test --workspace
```

All tests must pass.

### 3. Clippy

```bash
cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings
```

No new warnings introduced.

### 4. Cross-Crate Integration

Verify crates that depend on ftui-widgets still work:
- ftui-extras (canvas, charts, forms features)
- ftui-harness (dev-dependency)
- ftui (main crate)

### 5. Documentation

```bash
cargo doc --workspace --no-deps
```

Documentation builds without errors.

### 6. Feature Combinations

Test key feature combinations:

```bash
cargo check -p ftui-extras --features canvas
cargo check -p ftui-extras --features forms
cargo check -p ftui-extras --features charts
```

## Success Criteria

- ✓ `cargo check --workspace` passes
- ✓ `cargo test --workspace` passes
- ✓ `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` passes
- ✓ No regressions in functionality
- ✓ All dependent crates compile

## If Issues Found

Create new beads for any issues discovered during verification.
This bead is only marked complete when ALL checks pass.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T23:23:37.279584061Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T23:35:58.826218081Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T23:35:35.076295382Z","close_reason":"All verification checks pass. Widget API migration complete.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2ixu","depends_on_id":"bd-10y0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T21:12:16Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2ixu","depends_on_id":"bd-1abx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T21:12:16Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2ixu","depends_on_id":"bd-1rqf","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T21:12:16Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2ixu","depends_on_id":"bd-2pip","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T21:12:16Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2ixu","depends_on_id":"bd-z8q6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T21:12:16Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":233,"issue_id":"bd-2ixu","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Verification Execution Plan

### Unit Test Requirements (with detailed logging)

1. **Widget Signature Tests** - Verify all Widget impls use Frame:
   ```bash
   # Run with detailed logging
   RUST_LOG=debug cargo test -p ftui-widgets -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee widget_tests.log
   ```

2. **Frame Feature Tests** - Test hit_grid, cursor, degradation:
   ```bash
   RUST_LOG=debug cargo test -p ftui-render frame -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tee frame_tests.log
   ```

3. **Integration Tests** - Cross-crate compilation:
   ```bash
   cargo check --workspace 2>&1 | tee workspace_check.log
   ```

### E2E Test Script
Create `scripts/widget_migration_e2e.sh`:
```bash
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
echo "=== Widget Migration E2E Test ==="
echo "[1/6] Workspace build..."
cargo build --workspace 2>&1 | tee build.log
echo "[2/6] Unit tests..."
cargo test --workspace 2>&1 | tee test.log
echo "[3/6] Clippy..."
cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings 2>&1 | tee clippy.log
echo "[4/6] Feature combinations..."
cargo check -p ftui-extras --features canvas,forms,charts 2>&1 | tee features.log
echo "[5/6] Documentation build..."
cargo doc --workspace --no-deps 2>&1 | tee doc.log
echo "[6/6] Widget grep verification..."
# Verify no old Buffer signatures remain
if rg 'fn render.*buf: &mut Buffer' crates/ftui-widgets/src/*.rs; then
  echo "ERROR: Found old Buffer signature!"
  exit 1
fi
echo "All verifications passed!"
```

### Success Criteria with Logging
- [ ] build.log shows no errors
- [ ] test.log shows all tests pass
- [ ] clippy.log shows no warnings
- [ ] features.log shows all feature combos compile
- [ ] doc.log shows docs build
- [ ] No old Buffer signatures found

","created_at":"2026-02-01T23:35:34Z"},{"id":235,"issue_id":"bd-2ixu","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Final Verification Results

### Build Status
- `cargo check --workspace` ✅ PASS
- `cargo test --workspace` ✅ PASS (all tests pass)

### Widget Migration Status
All Widget/StatefulWidget implementations now use `frame: &mut Frame`:

**ftui-widgets (16 files):**
- block.rs, input.rs, list.rs, paragraph.rs, progress.rs, rule.rs
- scrollbar.rs, spinner.rs, status_line.rs, table.rs, padding.rs
- panel.rs, constraint_overlay.rs, error_boundary.rs, cached.rs
- debug_overlay.rs (feature-gated), columns.rs

**ftui-extras (3 files):**
- forms.rs (Form, ConfirmDialog widgets)
- charts.rs (Sparkline, BarChart, LineChart)
- canvas.rs (Canvas)

### Fixes Made During Verification
1. table.rs: Added missing `hit_id: None` in constructor
2. columns.rs: Implemented Debug manually for Column (Box<dyn Widget> doesn't derive Debug)
3. ftui-harness/Cargo.toml: Added ftui-layout to dev-dependencies

### Note on --all-features
`cargo check --workspace --all-features` shows a pre-existing issue in grapheme_pool.rs (type inference with tracing feature combo). This is unrelated to Widget migration and was present before these changes.

 {"id":"bd-2j71","title":"Text Effects: Vertical and Diagonal Gradients","description":"## Background
Current gradients only support horizontal direction. Vertical, diagonal, and radial gradients complete the gradient system and enable effects like sunset (orange bottom, purple top).

## Implementation

Add new TextEffect variants:
```rust
TextEffect::VerticalGradient {
    gradient: ColorGradient,
    // For multi-line: t = row / total_rows
    // For single-line: uses text height in cells (e.g., ASCII art)
}

TextEffect::DiagonalGradient {
    gradient: ColorGradient,
    angle: f64,  // degrees: 0=right, 90=down, 180=left, 270=up
}

TextEffect::RadialGradient {
    gradient: ColorGradient,
    center: (f64, f64),  // normalized 0-1, (0.5, 0.5) = center
    aspect: f64,         // 1.0 = circular, 2.0 = horizontally stretched
}
```

### Coordinate Mapping:

| Type | t Calculation |
|------|---------------|
| Horizontal | char_idx / total_chars |
| Vertical (multi-line) | row_idx / total_rows |
| Vertical (single-line) | 0.5 (center color) OR uses AsciiArt height |
| Diagonal | (x*cos(θ) + y*sin(θ)) normalized to 0-1 |
| Radial | distance_from_center / max_distance |

### Animation Support:
All gradient variants can be animated by adding time offset:
```rust
// In StyledText, if gradient effect + time > 0:
let animated_t = (t + self.time * speed).rem_euclid(1.0);
```

### Single-Line Vertical Gradient Behavior:
For single-row text, vertical gradient returns gradient.sample(0.5) for all chars (middle of gradient). To get full vertical gradient effect, use multi-line text or AsciiArtText.

## Files
crates/ftui-extras/src/text_effects.rs

## Unit Tests (REQUIRED)
- test_vertical_multiline_top_is_start: Row 0 gets sample(0)
- test_vertical_multiline_bottom_is_end: Last row gets sample(1)
- test_vertical_singleline_is_middle: All chars get sample(0.5)
- test_diagonal_0_is_horizontal: Matches HorizontalGradient
- test_diagonal_90_is_vertical: Top-to-bottom sweep
- test_diagonal_angle_wraps: 450° same as 90°
- test_radial_center_is_start: Center gets sample(0)
- test_radial_corner_is_end: Corners get sample(1)
- test_radial_aspect_stretches: aspect=2 makes ellipse
- test_gradient_animated: Time offset moves gradient

## Visual Tests
- Snapshot vertical on 5-line AsciiArt text
- Snapshot diagonal at 45°
- Snapshot radial with aspect=1 vs aspect=2

## Acceptance Criteria
- Deliver the behavior implied by the title: Text Effects: Vertical and Diagonal Gradients
- Alien Artifact: define invariants + failure modes; if heuristics exist, specify an explainable decision rule (evidence ledger / Bayes factors where applicable)
- Extreme Optimization: baseline -> profile -> opportunity matrix; for each perf change include an isomorphism proof + golden output checksums
- Unit tests: happy path + edge cases + regression fixtures; add property tests for core invariants where applicable
- E2E: scripts with verbose JSONL logging (env, capabilities, timings, seed, checksums) + deterministic mode

-{"id":"bd-2k018","title":"Modular Table Theme System (All Tables)","description":"Goal:
- Unify table styling across all tables (widget tables + markdown tables) with a modular, animatable theming system.

Background / Problem:
- Styling is currently split: MarkdownTheme has table fields while widget tables have their own styling path.
- Users want consistent visuals, easy customization, tasteful animation, and clear preset selection guidance.

Design principles:
- Deterministic by default: animation uses explicit phase/time input (no implicit clocks).
- Lightweight: style resolution is O(1) per row/column; avoid hot-path allocations.
- No compatibility shims: adopt the new system directly (project preference).
- Presets should be readable at high density and a11y-friendly.

Deliverables:
- Shared TableTheme struct (border/header/row/alt/selected/hover + spacing/dividers).
- Effect hooks with row/column/section targeting and phase-driven transforms.
- Presets (aurora/graphite/neon/slate/solar/orchard/paper/midnight/terminal_classic) with strong defaults + easy overrides.
- Integrations in widget tables and markdown tables.
- Demo showcase with subtle animated highlight row.
- Preset preview gallery screen to compare presets side-by-side.
- Comprehensive unit tests, snapshots, and E2E scripts with structured logging.
- Public API ergonomics (builder helpers + re-exports) so customization is trivial.

Acceptance:
- All table render paths can be themed via one struct + optional animation phase.
- Presets look great out of the box; customization is ergonomic.
- Animation is tasteful, unobtrusive, deterministic.
- Tests + E2E logs prove correctness and prevent regressions.
","notes":"Fixed test failures in table_theme.rs: effect_resolver_all_rows_excludes_header and effect_resolver_all_cells_includes_header_rows - the pulse_effect helper takes (fg, bg) but tests had parameters swapped. Also added TableThemeSpec to public exports in ftui-style/src/lib.rs.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:40:11.758412732Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T04:06:47.880355830Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"bd-2k018.1","title":"Audit table styling touchpoints + constraints","description":"Purpose:
- Enumerate every table rendering touchpoint and its styling inputs so the new TableTheme can replace ad-hoc styling across the codebase.

Scope:
- ftui-widgets Table rendering path (header/row/zebra/selection handling).
- ftui-extras markdown table rendering (MarkdownTheme table fields, width fitting, borders).
- Demo showcase screens using Table widgets or markdown tables (e.g., dashboard, terminal_capabilities, widget_gallery).

Deliverables:
- File/function map of all table styling touchpoints.
- Notes on current Style/ColorToken usage and how to thread a shared TableTheme.
- Test/snapshot surfaces affected (unit + snapshot + E2E).
- Determinism constraints (where time/phase must be explicit).

Acceptance:
- A concise, self-contained map of all touchpoints and constraints is captured in the bead description/notes.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:40:23.896250402Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T18:48:42.400099867Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T18:48:42.400082645Z","close_reason":"Touchpoint map added in comments","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2k018.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2k018","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T21:12:16Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":236,"issue_id":"bd-2k018.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Touchpoints: ftui-widgets Table
- File: crates/ftui-widgets/src/table.rs
- Styles on Table: base style via Table::style (applied to entire table_area with set_style_area), highlight_style via Table::highlight_style (merged with row.style for selected row), column_spacing affects layout
- Styles on Row: Row::style (applied per row; header Row::style used for header area)
- Borders: Table optionally wraps Block (Block::render + Block::inner) for borders/titles; Block styling is independent of table styles
- Rendering flow: Table::render -> apply base style to table_area, render header + rows via render_row; render_row merges span style with row/table style, uses draw_text_span_with_link
- Constraints: uses Frame.degradation.apply_styling() to skip styles at lower degradation; pushes scissor to clip rows; column widths computed via Flex::horizontal + intrinsic widths (Text::width)

Touchpoints: ftui-extras Markdown tables
- File: crates/ftui-extras/src/markdown.rs
- Theme fields: MarkdownTheme::table_border/table_header/table_row/table_row_alt
- Rendering: RenderState::flush_table builds widths, applies table_max_width, emits border lines via table_border_line; row lines via table_row_line with base_style + border_style; cell spans styled in apply_table_cell_style
- Constraints: table_max_width (MarkdownRenderer::table_max_width) caps content width; table_cell_spans truncates with ellipsis using Span::split_at_cell (width-sensitive); table layout uses Unicode line-drawing characters

Demo showcase usage / overrides
- Table widget usage:
  - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/widget_gallery.rs (Table::new + header Row::style + Table::style + Block border theme)
  - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/intrinsic_sizing.rs (Table::new + header Row::style + Table::style + Block border theme)
  - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/terminal_capabilities.rs (Table::new + header Row::style; per-row Row::style for highlight/mismatch; Table::style + Block border theme)
- Markdown table styling overrides:
  - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/markdown_rich_text.rs (MarkdownTheme overrides for table_* styles; MarkdownRenderer::table_max_width)
  - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/markdown_live_editor.rs (MarkdownTheme overrides for table_* styles; table_max_width)
  - crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/dashboard.rs (MarkdownRenderer::table_max_width; wrap_markdown_for_panel avoids wrapping table-like lines)

Constraints/notes
- Determinism: table widths derived from Text/Span width metrics; no randomization
- Performance: table_row_line builds spans per cell; markdown table truncation uses per-span width and split_at_cell; table widget uses set_style_area to clear gaps
","created_at":"2026-02-04T18:46:24Z"}]}
